source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for English product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese headings, labels, tabular numbers, and calm pond-operations dashboards.
layout: Calm 8px grids, rounded floating-leaf navigation, lavender panel grouping, pond-water dividers, low aquatic shadows, 8px radii, and subtle ripple and leaf-gloss texture accents.

prompts.label: Transparent water hyacinth flower motif
prompts.workflow: Built-in imagegen chroma-key source on #ff00ff, then local chroma-key removal to transparent RGBA PNG without despill to preserve lavender petals.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a water hyacinth flower botanical motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A water hyacinth floating plant with one lavender-purple flower spike, six-petaled blossoms, the distinctive violet upper petal with a small golden-yellow eye, glossy rounded green leaves, bulbous floating petioles, and a compact rosette form. Botanical accuracy, crisp opaque edges, tropical pond identity, natural petal veins and waxy leaf highlights.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include flower spike, leaves, and a small cluster of floating stems without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no pond landscape, no water surface, no pot, no vase, no bouquet, no insects, no hand, no text, no watermark, no extra plant species.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.workflow: Built-in imagegen board source, resized to 3840x2160 for the catalog asset.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Water Hyacinth light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Water Hyacinth", derived from the visible water hyacinth flower cutout in this conversation. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible calm aquatic interface system.
Canvas: exact 16:9 wide board, 3840x2160 4K-class composition, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Water Hyacinth, Water Hyacinth Flower, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Extract palette and interaction language from lavender petals, violet petal veins, golden flower-eye accents, glossy rounded green leaves, bulbous floating petioles, blue-green pond water reflections, and warm tropical neutrals. Use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals from those sources.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; readable labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep all text short and legible.
UI coverage: primary and secondary buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette search, sidebar navigation, top navigation, tropical pond operations dashboard metric cards, calm line chart, area chart, progress states, empty/loading/error states, token swatches, texture samples, spacing scale, 8px radius token, shadow tokens, simple lucide-style icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px radii, light pond-mist background, lavender-petal panels, glossy leaf-green primary actions, pond-water borders and focus rings, golden flower-eye highlights, subtle water-ripple texture, calm aquatic system mood.
Composition: organize as a polished design-system poster with large readable headings and practical UI examples, not a marketing landing page.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradient theme, no beige-only palette, no lotus or water lily imagery, no stock photos, no tiny unreadable paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Water Hyacinth".

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.workflow: Built-in imagegen board source, resized to 3840x2160 for the catalog asset.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Water Hyacinth dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Water Hyacinth". It must feel like the same visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible water hyacinth flower cutout.
Canvas: exact 16:9 wide board, 3840x2160 4K-class composition, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Water Hyacinth, Water Hyacinth Flower, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Preserve the system language from the light board: lavender petals, violet petal veins, glossy leaf greens, pond-water teals, golden flower-eye accents, tropical mist neutrals, bulbous floating-stem shapes, soft water-ripple texture, 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; readable labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep all text short and legible.
UI coverage: primary and secondary buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette search, sidebar navigation, top navigation, tropical pond operations dashboard metric cards, calm line chart, area chart, progress states, empty/loading/error states, token swatches, texture samples, spacing scale, 8px radius token, shadow tokens, simple lucide-style icons.
Visual details: dark background from deepest pond-water and leaf-shadow colors, light text from mist and pale lavender petals, glossy green active states, violet-petal secondary surfaces, teal focus rings, golden flower-eye highlights, subtle ripple overlays, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls.
Composition: organize as a polished dark design-system poster with large readable headings and practical UI examples, not a marketing landing page.
Constraints: no neon colors, no flat pure-black-only background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradient theme, no lotus or water lily imagery, no tiny unreadable paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Water Hyacinth".
